title: LibZ
description: Open source library for a couple of Globox_Z mods
body:
[![ServerAtelier](https://www.serveratelier.com/assets/themes/atelier/assets/images/banner/sa_budget.png)](https://www.serveratelier.com/) ![Headline](https://i.imgur.com/xtuhDhy.png)
[](https://discord.gg/cV4cJyGXqF) [](https://globox1997.github.io/wiki/mods/LibZ/) [](https://github.com/Globox1997/LibZ/issues)


This mod is a library mod for a couple of Globox_Z's mods. One main feature it adds is the tab registry for visible screen tabs. Honestly, I never wanted to create a library mod and publish it here like others did but after modding for quite some time now, this makes sense.

[](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) This mod is developed for Fabric. There are no plans to develop a Forge version. Modpack Permission: Feel free to use it in any modpacks. Bug Report: Just report bugs at the github page.
